ddl.where: "deleted_at" IS NULL AND "email" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: uq_sales_partners_email

ddl.where: "deleted_at" IS NULL AND "barcode" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: uq_sales_product_templates_barcode

ddl.where: "deleted_at" IS NULL AND "barcode" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: uq_sales_product_variants_barcode

ddl.where: "deleted_at" IS NULL AND "sku" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: uq_sales_products_sku

ddl.where: "deleted_at" IS NULL AND "sequence_number" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: uq_sales_orders_sequence_number

ddl.value: "posting_status" <> 'posted' OR ("posted_by" IS NOT NULL AND "posted_at" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: chk_sales_accounting_postings_posted_consistency

ddl.value: "posting_status" <> 'reversed' OR ("reversed_by" IS NOT NULL AND "reversed_at" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: chk_sales_accounting_postings_reversed_consistency

ddl.value: "discount_percent" IS NOT NULL OR "discount_amount" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: chk_sales_line_item_discounts_requires_value

ddl.value: "date_end" IS NULL OR "date_start" IS NULL OR "date_end" >= "date_start"
ddl.name: chk_sales_pricelist_items_date_range

ddl.value: "status" <> 'approved' OR ("approved_by" IS NOT NULL AND "approved_date" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: chk_sales_return_orders_approved_requires_actor

ddl.value: "status" IN ('draft', 'cancelled') OR ("approved_by" IS NOT NULL AND "approved_date" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: chk_sales_return_orders_progressed_requires_approval

ddl.value: "price_listed_at" IS NULL OR "price_unit" >= "price_listed_at" OR "price_override_reason" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: chk_sales_order_lines_price_override_reason_required

ddl.value: "price_listed_at" IS NULL OR "price_unit" >= "price_listed_at" OR "price_approved_by" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: chk_sales_order_lines_price_override_approval_required

ddl.value:
"margin_percent" = CASE
        WHEN "price_subtotal" = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE round(("profit_amount" / "price_subtotal") * 100, 4)
      END
ddl.name: chk_sales_order_lines_margin_percent_formula

ddl.value:
"margin_percent" = CASE
        WHEN "amount_untaxed" = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE round(("amount_profit" / "amount_untaxed") * 100, 4)
      END
ddl.name: chk_sales_orders_margin_percent_formula

ddl.value: "validity_date" IS NULL OR "quotation_date" IS NULL OR "validity_date" >= "quotation_date"
ddl.name: chk_sales_orders_validity_date_after_quotation

ddl.value: "exchange_rate_used" IS NULL OR "exchange_rate_source" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: chk_sales_orders_exchange_rate_source_required

ddl.value: NOT "credit_check_passed" OR ("credit_check_at" IS NOT NULL AND "credit_check_by" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: chk_sales_orders_credit_check_consistency

ddl.value: ("signed_by" IS NULL AND "signed_on" IS NULL) OR ("signed_by" IS NOT NULL AND "signed_on" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: chk_sales_orders_signature_consistency

ddl.value: "status" NOT IN ('cancelled', 'expired') OR "date_end" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: chk_sales_subscriptions_closed_requires_end_date

ddl.value: "zip_to" IS NULL OR "zip_from" IS NULL OR "zip_to" >= "zip_from"
ddl.name: chk_sales_territory_rules_zip_range
